generated_oml:
prefix base: http://example.org/base#
prefix DTDFVocab: http://example.org/DTDFVocab#
instance SystemUnderStudy : DTDFVocab:SystemUnderStudy [
    base:desc "The building or infrastructure asset within the AECO domain, represented as a cyber-physical system through the integration of static models and runtime data to enable simulation, analysis, and optimization across the entire lifecycle from design to operational phases.",
    DTDFVocab:hasEnvironment BuildingAsset
]

    base:desc "Standardized extension points for integrating custom services and analytics in digital twin"
]

    base:desc "Building Control Engineers role for device modeling and deployment within BIM environment"
]

    base:desc "Facility Managers role for real-time monitoring and control via interactive interfaces"
]

    base:desc "DT Engineers role for service integration and modular extension point management"
]
instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Temperature sensor defined within BIM by Building Control Engineers for runtime semantics and post-occupancy data collection",
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]
instance HumiditySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Humidity sensor defined within BIM by Building Control Engineers for runtime semantics and post-occupancy data collection",
    DTDFVocab:producedData HumidityDataTransmitted
]
instance MotionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motion sensor defined within BIM by Building Control Engineers for runtime semantics and post-occupancy data collection",
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotionDataTransmitted
]
instance LightingSystemActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuator for lighting systems defined within BIM by Building Control Engineers with control signals fed back to Building Control System through specified control semantics"
]
instance DTFramework : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Centralized DT Framework acting as a hub coordinating roles and components"
]
instance BuildingAsset : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "A building or infrastructure asset within the AECO domain, represented as a cyber-physical system for simulation, analysis, and optimization across the entire lifecycle from design to operational phases",
    base:contains TemperatureSensor, HumiditySensor, MotionSensor, LightingSystemActuator, DTFramework, BuildingControlEngineerRole, FacilityManagerRole, DTEngineerRole, StandardizedExtensionPoints
]
instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature data transmitted from physical asset to digital twin for synchronization",
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]
instance HumidityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Real-time humidity data transmitted from physical asset to digital twin for synchronization",
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HumiditySensor
]
instance MotionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Real-time motion data transmitted from physical asset to digital twin for synchronization",
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotionSensor
]
instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono for real-time data exchange between physical assets and digital twin",
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, OptimizationService, VisualizationService
]
instance Ditto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Ditto for real-time data exchange between physical assets and digital twin",
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, OptimizationService, VisualizationService
]
instance UnrealEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine for rich, interactive visualization of building infrastructure",
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]
instance MDEProcess : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering process for extracting structured representations from enriched BIM assets",
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, OptimizationService, VisualizationService
]
instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Temperature data from physical sensor for digital twin synchronization",
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, Ditto
]
instance HumidityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Humidity data from physical sensor for digital twin synchronization",
    DTDFVocab:fromData HumidityDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, Ditto
]
instance MotionData : DTDFVocab:Data [

    DTDFVocab:fromData MotionDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, Ditto
]

    base:desc "Real-time insight on building environmental and operational conditions"
]
instance PredictiveInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive insight on potential infrastructure failures or maintenance needs"
]
instance OptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimization insight for energy consumption and operational efficiency improvements"
]
instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Interactive visualization of building systems and data for stakeholder collaboration"
]
instance ControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Control action for building systems such as lighting and HVAC",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]
instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring service for infrastructure status and operational performance",
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight, ControlAction
]
instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics service for infrastructure failure forecasting and maintenance planning",
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveInsight
]
instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization service for energy efficiency and resource allocation in building operations",
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimizationInsight
]
instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive visualization service for Facility Managers to monitor and control building systems",
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]
instance BIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Building Information Modeling (BIM) as the foundational geometric model enriched with semantic annotations for Building Control System components",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MDEProcess
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Bidirectional communication enabling control signals to be transmitted from the digital twin to physical Building Control Systems (BCS), with no specific technical details provided in the document regarding command types, formats, or validation mechanisms."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time data exchange capabilities ensure continuous synchronization between physical buildings and their digital counterparts"
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Modular architecture with standardized extension points supporting custom service and analytics integration, where the DT Framework serves as a central hub for bidirectional data exchange enabling holistic building life cycle management"
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin lifecycle encompasses initial device modeling within BIM environments where Building Control Engineers define sensors, actuators, and controllers to address BIM's limitations in representing Building Control System (BCS) components. Model-Driven Engineering (MDE) principles transform enriched BIM models into structured representations for automatic generation of deployable DT artifacts. Real-time data exchange ensures continuous synchronization between physical and digital twins, while interactive visualization provides immersive interfaces for Facility Managers to monitor and control operations. The modular architecture with standardized extension points enables DT Engineers to integrate custom services and analytics, facilitating lifecycle governance through role-specific responsibilities."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model validity is assessed using the Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric to measure alignment between the Digital Twin and physical counterpart, with validation performed after model creation."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono and Ditto serve as the central hub for real-time data exchange, with no specific details on network topology, protocols, bandwidth, latency, or security protocols provided in the document."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Interoperability across heterogeneous systems addressed through non-functional requirements (NF_X), with modular architecture and standardized extension points enabling integration of custom services and analytics"
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The framework adheres to Building Information Modeling (BIM) standards as the foundational specification for device modeling and semantic representation, ensuring compatibility with AECO-specific systems and standards for construction project complexity requirements."
]
